# sevalla_application (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Sevalla application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_application" "example" {
  id = "fb5e5168-4281-4bec-94c5-0d1584e9e657"
}

output "app_name" {
  value = data.sevalla_application.example.display_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the application.

### Read-Only

- `allow_deploy_paths` (List of String) Paths that trigger a deployment when changed.
- `auto_deploy` (Boolean) Whether auto deploy is enabled.
- `build_cache_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the build cache is enabled.
- `build_path` (String) The build path within the repository.
- `build_type` (String) The build type.
- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster where the application is deployed.
- `company_id` (String) The company ID that owns the application.
- `created_at` (String) When the application was created.
- `created_by` (String) The user who created the application.
- `default_branch` (String) The default branch to deploy from.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the application.
- `docker_context` (String) The Docker build context path.
- `docker_image` (String) The Docker image to deploy.
- `docker_registry_credential_id` (String) The ID of the Docker registry credential.
- `dockerfile_path` (String) The path to the Dockerfile.
- `git_type` (String) The Git provider type.
- `hibernate_after_seconds` (Number) Seconds of inactivity before hibernation.
- `hibernation_enabled` (Boolean) Whether hibernation is enabled.
- `ignore_deploy_paths` (List of String) Paths to ignore for deployment triggers.
- `is_suspended` (Boolean) Whether the application is suspended.
- `name` (String) The system-generated name of the application.
- `namespace` (String) The Kubernetes namespace.
- `nixpacks_version` (String) The Nixpacks version.
- `pack_builder` (String) The Cloud Native Buildpack builder.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID associated with this application.
- `repo_url` (String) The repository URL for the application source.
- `source` (String) The source type of the application.
- `status` (String) The current status of the application.
- `type` (String) The application type.
- `updated_at` (String) When the application was last updated.
- `wait_for_checks` (Boolean) Whether to wait for checks before deploying.
